---
title: "Welcome To My Blog"
author: "Laszlo Szabo"
date: 2023-05-10
categories: [news, site improvement]
---

Hello!

This is my first blog post here.

I will summarise here my plan how to construct this site and how to improve it in the future.

I will post regular updates, as I am making or not making progress.

This will be an interesting journey.

Enjoy!

## Useful links for Quarto

[Building a blog with Quarto](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CVcvXfRyfE0)

[Publish a blog in 100 sec](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t8qtcDyCRFA)
